projectDescription: An automated WhatsApp bot that sends scheduled entry and exit notifications via GitHub Actions
keyFeatures: Automated WhatsApp messaging via Ultramsg API
Scheduled notifications using GitHub Actions cron jobs
publicApiSurface: enviar_registro() - Main function to send attendance notifications
INSTANCE_ID - Environment variable for Ultramsg instance
TOKEN - Environment variable for Ultramsg authentication
GROUP_ID - Environment variable for WhatsApp group/contact ID
